feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Ghost King's Family (of Knights)
entry.summary:
Author: MysticRose1992

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,489Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 14

Summary: The GIW had found Danny. His Parents had sacrificed themselves to try to protect not only him but his fraid. However, the GIW were one step ahead of them and had erected a barrier that no ghost or human could pass through. Desperate to not only get his fraid to safety but to stop the GIW from destroying the Infinite Realms and in turn all of the other universes, Danny (with the help of Clockwork) used a portal to get his fraid out of Amity Park for help.

entry.title: Clark first finds out Bruce has a tattoo!
entry.summary:
Author: naydene_is_ICONIC

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 576Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: A nice morning between Clark and Bruce, where Clark finds out he might not know his boyfriend as well as he thinks Possibly a collection of superbat fics centered around Bruce or Clark having tattoos/piercings! First POSTED fic, hope you enjoy. And thank you @gicoon8987 on tumblr for inspiring me with your wonderful fanart of Bruce!

entry.title: The Ring Between Darkness and Light
entry.summary:
Author: ShiningChimp

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,210Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Two masked legends rise from opposite worlds: Bruce Wayne, the brooding heir who forged himself into El Murciélago under the weight of grief, and Clark Kent, the bright‑hearted farm boy who becomes El Hombre de Acero with nothing but hope and raw strength. In the electrifying world of lucha libre, their rivalry becomes the stuff of myth—shadow against sunlight, precision against power. But beneath every clash, every stare, every brush of bodies in the ring, something deeper sparks. Neither man expects it. Neither man can stop it. And the fight that will define them is the one they never saw coming: falling in love.

entry.title: Two Heroes and a Baby
entry.summary:
Author: xxEmilee_Lunaxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 97,661Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 514

Summary: In this AU, 19-year-old Bruce Wayne adopts 4-year-old Dick Grayson after he is orphaned by a tragic event at Haly's Circus. Bruce is in over his head trying to juggle establishing himself as a responsible and valuable asset to Wayne Enterprises, beginning his vigilante work in Gotham as The Batman, and parenting a young child despite not knowing where to start. After struggling to get good press and constantly being seen as an irresponsible nepo baby, he sets up an interview at The Daily Planet. That's where he meets 19-year-old intern Clark Kent, who is eager to write a good story to begin his career as a journalist. After Clark agrees to keep an eye on Dick during his interview, Bruce realizes he has a knack for watching children, especially young Dick Grayson. Bruce asks Clark to come live with him at Wayne Manor on a 6 month assignment as Dick's nanny, and in return, will let Clark write the story of a lifetime--an expose on his life that no other reporter has even come close to. Clark reluctantly agrees, but is hiding a secret from Bruce--his life as the superhero, Superman! As the two begin their friendship and double lives as heroes, they learn valuable lessons in friendship, love, and parenting.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Symbiotic Relationship of Birds and Bats in Water
entry.summary:
Author: NoodleDragon324

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,634Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 53

Summary: The first time it happens, Bruce nearly dies. Part of him is grateful that his memory of his kiss-of-life was more in the knowledge that it happened than genuine recollection. The second time it happens, Bruce felt like he was dying. How was he supposed to forget the feeling of his best friend's, his most trusted companion's, lips firm and insistent against his own? The third time is different, but Bruce wishes aloud that it wasn't. Little did he know, this admission was all it would take to make his wish come true. OR Three times that Clark saves Bruce, twice from drowning and once that left him drowning in an entirely different way.

entry.title: Coming Home to You
entry.summary:
Author: RandomFan001

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,085Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 119

Summary: Clark had long given up his dream of finding his soulmate. The weird feeling he had when his eyes met Batman’s wasn’t anything but nerves and attraction. Definitely not. But when his instincts start acting up, he starts to suspect it’s something else. Worst of all, so does Batman. Featuring; healthy co-parenting, a healthy amount of pining, and a story about finding love and family

entry.title: World's Finest Parents
entry.summary:
Author: remember_april_andbeglad

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,121Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 93

Summary: Clark stops before the front door, glancing at Bruce with eyes full of adoration. Bruce gazes back coolly, but Clark has loved him for long enough to recognize the tiny tug at the corners of his husband's mouth. It's the same anticipation, almost eager, that they share in the moments before they leap into battle together, before they make love, even before Bruce makes up his mind to torment Clark at any of his press engagements with Wayne Enterprises (it's good to have hobbies together). It's the feeling of an unshakeable trust and synergy, strong enough to weather planetary threats and grade-school bureaucracy.-Clark finds out that Bruce is a member of the PTA at Damian's school. (Who knew that Justice League leadership skills are surprisingly transferable?)

entry.title: Adoption to Adoration
entry.summary:
Author: Missingjay

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,553Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 197

Summary: Bruce Wayne, interstellar bounty hunter, is trapped in a nightmare. Lost in the depths of space, abducted by aliens and held captive as a mindless beast. Powerless to resist the whims of the aliens or reason with them for his release, he is utterly trapped. Kal-el, a freelance journalist specializing in xenobiology correspondence, is in love. A surly little unclassified mammalian at the shelter he volunteers at has stolen his core. He’s never had a pet before and this creature has a history of servere behavioral problems, but he can’t let the poor thing be euthanized without trying to save it. How hard could exotic pet ownership be.

entry.title: After Many Springs
entry.summary:
Author: Burning_Sands999

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,257Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 77

Summary: This man looks like Clark. He sounds like Clark. The look on his face is identical to the one Clark wore when his favorite cow had been put down on the farm several years ago. But he can’t be Clark. Clark is gone. Clark has been gone. Clark isn’t coming back. Or:On a seemingly normal day in 2027, Superman disappears.Three years later, he comes back with no memory of ever leaving.This is the fallout.

entry.summary:
Author: LoneChestnutTree

entry.summary:
Author: maraudersmqry

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 127,484Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 3,296

entry.title: Being part of the Kent-Wayne family isn’t so bad
entry.summary:
Author: PurpleButterfly19

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,898Chapters: 4/39Kudos: 60

Summary: It’s been three years since Dick and Kori got married, and many things have changed for the Kent-Wayne family. The family grew larger through more adoptions and also biological ties. New soulmates were discovered, more weddings were held, the Justice League can finally put a name to the man behind the cowl, and Wayne Manor will never look the same again. But the greatest change? Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent are officially engaged. This is the story of how they got there. As for Conner? He couldn’t be doing any better!

entry.title: How Long Has This Been Going On?
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,094Chapters: 7/10Kudos: 125

Summary: “On the roof. I know what it was,” The boy said. “What was it? What did you see?” Clark said, glancing around. “It was Death I think?” He replied. “Death? What does that mean?” “Death was watching,” John began matter of factly, raising a hand to point behind Clark, “Death was watching and he was looking at you.” Quickly, Clark whipped his head to look in the direction John was pointing. He turned just quickly enough to see a wisp of black disappear behind a building. OR Batman stalks the hell out of Superman. Bruce Wayne is intrigued by Clark Kent. Superman is horrified by Batman. Bumbling reporter Clark Kent can’t seem to figure Bruce Wayne out. Identity mishaps occur. Idea from @lescrenti ‘s TikTok!New chapter every other day

entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part One
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,734Chapters: 4/14Kudos: 2

Summary: Five months after disappearing, Aven Davis is running out of time—and out of places to hide. A volatile implant is the only thing keeping the queen inside him dormant, sending him straight into Metropolis and unexpectedly back into Clark Kent’s orbit.Meanwhile, Bruce Wayne’s search for Aven takes a devastating turn, revealing betrayals that put every step he’s taken under Weyland-Yutani’s gaze. With the clock ticking and danger closing in, all three men are pulled toward a collision that will decide whether Aven survives long enough to ever come home. (Please Read Ashes In The Dark part one and Two before Reading.)

entry.title: Kryptonian Reproduction, an Observation
entry.summary:
Author: Winkaku

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 80,170Chapters: 27/27Kudos: 1,604

Summary: They'd been caught in each others orbit for some time now and, quite frankly, Clark should have seen this coming. Crazy was part and parcel to Gotham after all... let alone his own life. His father had warned him about mad scientists, but Clark had the distinct feeling that this was not what he'd envisioned in the slightest.AKA: A series of PWP vignettes wherein the plot is entirely background and I burn through kinks faster than a sorority freshman. Seriously, I’m running out of ideas, leave a comment with a suggestion and I’ll see what I can do.AKA: That time I tried to make a kinky science fic that turned into a writing challenge that turned into a crazy romp with associated art pieces. Fun was had by all.

entry.title: bats on film
entry.summary:
Author: outboard

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,467Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 185

Summary: "Bruce, your neck," Georgia stressed, her face slightly flushed. With a frown, Bruce tucked his chin, bringing a hand up to feel along his neck. Everything felt normal, his nerves responding to his touch, nothing too warm or too cold—all the same as it had been earlier this morning. Bruce's thumb caught the edge of a hickey on his collarbone. Oh, shit.The morning after a night spent with Clark, Bruce has to do an underwear photoshoot. What he doesn't expect is for people to start guessing who exactly gave him all those bruises. (He'll just have to set the record straight.)

entry.title: All My Traitor Heart
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,476Chapters: 33/33Kudos: 13

Summary: Gotham, 1935. Bruce Malone is a private investigator with a shingle, a past he doesn't advertise, and a client who smells like jasmine and trouble in equal measure. Diana Prinkipas needs a treasure found. Clark Kent needs a job. Bruce needs to stop noticing things he has no business noticing. Nobody gets what they need. A noir in sixteen movements, one interrogation tape, and a coat button that costs twenty years.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Seats of Stars
entry.summary:
Author: JUBE514

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 87,227Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 1,446

Summary: Kon-el's entry into the Royal Family is an upset. He changes the hierarchy and whispers that he could assassination the Crown Prince Jon roam the castle halls.Kon's also 13 and desperately trying to find his place in the viperous world of the royal court. He's hoping that training a taur, a wild and whipsmart colt from the Drake stables, will be just the thing to show everyone he's someone to be taken seriously.But taurs are not easy creatures to handle. They are strong and smart and not willing to be led by the weak-willed. His father Kal-El might have the strongest bond in the kingdom with his taur, Bruce, but that's no guarantee Kon will too.-----Tim has been brought to a strange place.He's been taken from the place he lived and told that he was to be the seat of a little prince. They put him in reins and saddles and expected him to bow down. He will not bow down. But also... he doesn't know what to do. His herd is gone. His mother is gone. He's alone. Except for the other taurs, the two brothers, Dick and Jason, and the frightening huge, Bruce. They offer him a family but... is this all a trick for his obedience?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Ever Slightly Out of Reach
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,628Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 8

Summary: Three years after Superman died in neural drift, the UN Pan-Pacific Defense Committee has finally found language cowardly enough to say what they've always meant: loving Clark Kent makes Bruce Wayne unfit for duty. They think they can regulate grief away through proper documentation. They think love is a security risk that can be managed through committee oversight. They think the strongest drift came from discipline rather than devotion. Bruce Wayne is about to make their institutional cowardice very, very expensive.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
